channel.title: Karthik Raja V - Engineering Notes
channel.description: Writing about MedTech systems automation, test architecture, performance engineering, and product building.

item.title: MedSBOM: Building an Open-Source FDA Compliance Tool
item.description: The engineering decisions behind an open-source compliance layer for medical-device SBOM workflows.

item.title: How I Built AI Bug Analyzer
item.description: A CI-integrated system for turning test failures into structured JIRA bugs.

item.title: How I Built a Performance Framework That Scales to 75K Devices
item.description: Realistic workload simulation, adaptive polling, and useful latency evidence at scale.

item.title: Pipeline Qualification: Making CI/CD Reports Trustworthy
item.description: Entry and exit criteria for regulated release decisions.

item.title: Why I Built Vystra Build
item.description: Applying MedTech engineering discipline to construction operations software.

item.title: Vision Beyond the OR: Post-Operative Recovery Companion
item.description: A patient recovery concept built at J&J Hack4Health to surface escalation signals after surgery.

item.title: Building in Public: The Vystra Approach
item.description: Documenting product decisions, failures, architecture, and lessons as they happen.
